Market for Common Stock
Effective December 9, 2025, the principal market on which Walmart's common stock is listed has been the Nasdaq Global Select Market. Prior to
December 9, 2025, Walmart's common stock was listed on the New York Stock Exchange. The common stock trades under the symbol "WMT."

We are subject to income taxes in the U.S. and numerous foreign jurisdictions. Our tax returns are routinely audited and settlements of issues raised

items.title: Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

Market Risk
In addition to the risks inherent in our operations, we are exposed to certain market risks, including changes in interest rates, currency exchange rates
and the fair values of certain equity and equity method investments measured on a recurring basis.

Investment Risk
We are exposed to investment risk primarily related to changes in the fair value of certain equity investments, including certain immaterial equity
